agreed_overrides.tense_consistency: Past tense for all roles except current position
agreed_overrides.action_verb_intensity: Use assertive action verbs — avoid passive voice and weak constructions
agreed_overrides.bold_achievements: Bold numeric metrics and key results in work history bullets
agreed_overrides.cv_density: Keep CV to 2 pages max — cut verbose phrasing and redundant responsibilities
agreed_overrides.improve_conciseness: Refine long bullets (over 18 words) for scan-speed readability
agreed_overrides.cl_hook_style: Impact-driven opening — lead with a specific achievement, not a generic application statement

data.negotiation_summary: 7 override(s) applied across 4 style dimension(s). 0 kept as-is. 0 customised. Outcome: OVERRIDES_APPLIED.
